description: Merge conflict failed at tier ai-resolve. Branch: overstory/builder-phase67u/SDLC-KIT-8794. Agent: builder-phase67u. Conflicting files: .

content: Plugin structure follows official Claude Code plugin spec: .claude-plugin/plugin.json at plugin root, commands/ and agents/ at plugin root level (not inside .claude-plugin/). plugin.json contains only standard fields: name, description, version, author, homepage, repository, license, keywords. Commands are namespaced as /sdlc-launcher:<command> when loaded via --plugin-dir.
